resolution.value: Interdimensional beings blend Alex into a timeline where she belongs with her family
resolution.quote: the little figures watch her as she blends into the timeline almost seamlessly

investigator.value: Alex, an amnesiac woman trying to discover her identity and which reality is real
investigator.quote: So I find myself in front of a computer, head on the desk wondering how I got here

red_herring.value: Multiple false realities presented as potential truth - the business meeting scenario, the family scenario, and the mansion scenario all serve as misdirection from the dimensional manipulation reveal
red_herring.quote: What made her go upstairs before she woke up? She strained but could not remember anything before opening her eyes.

clue_fairness.value: Reader experiences Alex's confusion and memory gaps simultaneously, with no hidden information withheld
clue_fairness.quote: So I find myself in front of a computer, head on the desk wondering how I got here.

social_world.value: Academic/professional setting suggested by professor's office, family domestic hierarchy with Jim and children
social_world.quote: bookshelves full of books that look to be for a professor of some type

reveal_mechanic.value: Dimensional observers revealed as puppet masters manipulating reality and timelines, demonstrated through multiple parallel dimension scenarios
reveal_mechanic.quote: the little figures watch her as she blends into the timeline almost seamlessly

investigator_wound.value: Complete memory loss and identity confusion - Alex cannot investigate because she doesn't know who she is or what reality she inhabits
investigator_wound.quote: Wait, who am I? What is my name? This is not right, why is my mind so blank?

_meta.title: ebook sara hansen who am i
